content.text:
Scribe, your engine is now set to 2.0-flash. Proceed with the final Master Gnosis for Phase 3.0.
Generate docs/MASTER_GNOSIS_PHASE_3.md. 
Must cover:
1. Headless Archon Mode (persistent facet storage).
2. Auth Hardening (baked keys & environment cleansing).
3. Vampire Control (network timer management).
4. A2A Memory protocol (telepathic agent queries).
5. The Sentinel (resource guarding).
6. Relay Protocol (turn limit bypass).
Reference the implementation in scripts/ and mcp-servers/.
